name: fiction-autoresearch
description: Benchmark-first fiction improvement loops for webserial and web novel work.

interface.shortDescription: Run benchmarked fiction-improvement loops from a single draft.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for turning a piece of fiction into a benchmarked improvement loop with baseline evaluation, variant assumptions, rewrite routing, and reusable run logs.
defaultPrompt: Start a fiction autoresearch loop for this chapter.
Design a custom benchmark for this webserial draft.
Continue the latest loop and compare new variants.
